summary: Full e2e testing of FunzionaBene.it clinic management system. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 minor assertion fix applied). Frontend: all critical flows tested and working.

minor.issue: Returns 'appuntamenti_oggi'/'appuntamenti_totali' keys, not 'appuntamenti'. Test updated accordingly. Not a bug - just different key naming.

integration_issues.issue: Register route is '/registrati' not '/register'. The login page 'Registrati' link correctly points to /registrati but /register returns login page. Minor discoverability issue.

issues: Insurance expiry date '31/12/2025' shown in red - correct behavior indicating expired insurance

action_items: Minor: Consider adding /register redirect to /registrati for better UX (users may try /register)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 753 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth.py, terapisti.py, etc.) for maintainability

Route ordering issue potential: /terapisti/profilo/me and /terapisti/{terapista_id} - FastAPI handles this correctly but 'profilo' being after {id} routes could conflict. Currently works but should verify.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env - acceptable for dev but should be restricted in production
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded demo data: admin, demo.terapeuta (Maria Rossi), demo.paziente (Luca Bianchi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Backend API uses httpOnly cookies for auth (no Bearer token in response - cookies are set). The /api/dashboard/stats returns appuntamenti_oggi and appuntamenti_totali (not appuntamenti). Register route is /registrati not /register. Demo data seeded on startup with Maria Rossi (terapeuta) and Luca Bianchi (paziente). Email OTP is MOCKED - returned in otp_dev field. Daily.co video calls are MOCKED with placeholder.
